saveframes.name: assigned_chem_shift_list_1
tags:
The N-terminal residues 9-69 show two or more NMR resonances for 15N and
13C. The residues S76, V77 and N78 have one signal set for 13C, but two
distinct NMR resonances for 15N. For the BMRB entry the most prominent
NMR resonance pattern were selected for residues in this segment.
